appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/environment.md to note that local inference now requires an ONNX Runtime shared library at runtime and supports the ORT_DYLIB_PATH override, while API mode does not need ONNX Runtime.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the implementation-worker requirement around manual `--help` verification for core-only changes, or require workers to mark `followedProcedure` false when they skip those checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The remove-feature-flags-core review found that .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md requires manual `vera --help` / `--local` verification for feature-flag removal, but the worker transcript skeleton for session eb29d72e-285f-4ab1-bcbb-537b216c0b94 only showed build/test/clippy/fmt commands while the handoff still reported `followedProcedure: true`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add planning guidance that a feature's `fulfills` list should stay scoped to assertions directly implemented or explicitly verified by that feature, so validation ownership remains easy to audit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The simplify-install-ux review found that features.json maps the feature to VAL-INST-004 and VAL-INST-005 even though commit 687ebd7 only changed README.md plus vera-cli/vera-mcp Cargo.toml files and the handoff contained help/build/test/grep checks, not API-mode or lazy-model-download verification.
